raw_response_text:
<explanation>This target image shows a spiky purple flowering plant with a central bumpy, dotted blue-green flower head, which matches the visual pattern of the labeled examples for class 34 (sea holly/eryngium flowers). It does not match the flat, star-shaped light purple clematis of class 81, the orange/red nasturtiums of class 88, or the pink/white azalea flowers of class 71.</explanation>
<response>34</response>
